text:
Program Beneficiary-Level RIF will be provided quarterly and annually.
Quarterly release schedule is August of current year for (Q1), November of current year for (Q2), February of following year for (Q3), and May of following year for (Q4)

Date Requests Can Be Accepted for Upcoming Releases: 
2025 Final may be requested after 9/1/2026
2027 Preliminary may be requested after 2/1/2027
2027 Quarterly may be requested after 6/1/2027

 See more about all file availability
